𝗚𝗘𝗢-𝗢𝗣𝗧𝗜𝗠𝗜𝗭𝗘𝗥-𝗦𝗞𝗜𝗟𝗟 | Optimizing websites to be discoverable and citable by AI search engines.  🌟 Rising Fast!

⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬

𝗧𝗘𝗖𝗛 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗖𝗞: 🐍 Python 
🎯 𝗨𝗦𝗘 𝗖𝗔𝗦𝗘: Optimizing websites to be discoverable and citable by AI search engines.
📅 Created: Feb 2026 • Updated: May 2026

⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬

✨ 𝗞𝗘𝗬 𝗙𝗘𝗔𝗧𝗨𝗥𝗘𝗦 ✨

✅ Audit websites against 47 AI search engine visibility methods
✅ Generate actionable recommendations for optimization
✅ Create missing SEO files (robots.txt, llms.txt, schema, meta)
✅ Compare website versions and detect regressions
✅ Monitor AI visibility and track trends over time
✅ Generate JSON-LD schema for structured data
✅ Analyze citation quality within AI answers


⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬

⭐⭐⭐ 350 𝘀𝘁𝗮𝗿𝘀
🍴 37 𝗳𝗼𝗿𝗸𝘀
🔍 1 𝗼𝗽𝗲𝗻 𝗶𝘀𝘀𝘂𝗲𝘀

⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬

📝 𝗔𝗕𝗢𝗨𝗧 𝗧𝗛𝗜𝗦 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧

The GEO Optimizer is a Python toolkit designed to audit, optimize, and enhance website visibility for AI search engines like ChatGPT, Perplexity, Claude, and Gemini. It analyzes websites based on 47 research-backed methods to ensure they are discoverable and citable by AI.

⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬

• 𝗚𝗶𝘁𝗛𝘂𝗯: https://github.com/Auriti-Labs/geo-optimizer-skill

𝗪𝗜𝗥𝗘𝗧𝗔𝗣𝗣𝗘𝗥 | Passive wireless reconnaissance and signal intelligence gathering for OSINT and security analysis.  🌟 Rising Fast!

♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦

𝗧𝗘𝗖𝗛 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗖𝗞: 💻 HTML 
🎯 𝗨𝗦𝗘 𝗖𝗔𝗦𝗘: Passive wireless reconnaissance and signal intelligence gathering for OSINT and security analysis.
📅 Created: Jan 2026 • Updated: May 2026

♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦

✨ 𝗞𝗘𝗬 𝗙𝗘𝗔𝗧𝗨𝗥𝗘𝗦 ✨

✅ Passively detects Wi-Fi, Bluetooth, CCTV cameras, vehicles, headphones, TVs, IoT devices, and cell towers
✅ Maps and analyzes radio signals for situational intelligence
✅ Identifies leaked Wi-Fi network credentials using k-Anonymity
✅ Integrates with external API services like Wigle.net, wpa-sec, OpenCellID, and Shodan


♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦

📊 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗧𝗦

⭐⭐⭐⭐ 1.3K 𝘀𝘁𝗮𝗿𝘀
🍴 180 𝗳𝗼𝗿𝗸𝘀
🔍 0 𝗼𝗽𝗲𝗻 𝗶𝘀𝘀𝘂𝗲𝘀

♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦

📝 𝗔𝗕𝗢𝗨𝗧 𝗧𝗛𝗜𝗦 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧

WireTapper is a wireless OSINT and signal intelligence platform that passively detects, maps, and analyzes radio signals from various devices like Wi-Fi, Bluetooth, cameras, vehicles, and IoT appliances. It aims to provide situational intelligence by understanding the invisible wireless landscape without active intrusion.

♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦

🔗 𝗟𝗜𝗡𝗞𝗦
• 𝗚𝗶𝘁𝗛𝘂𝗯: https://github.com/h9zdev/WireTapper

𝗟𝗬𝗡𝗫𝗗𝗕 | Analyzing and querying log data in real-time or from files, with a focus on ease of use and performance through a single binary deployment.  🔥 Super Hot!

◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦

𝗧𝗘𝗖𝗛 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗖𝗞: 🐹 Go 
🎯 𝗨𝗦𝗘 𝗖𝗔𝗦𝗘: Analyzing and querying log data in real-time or from files, with a focus on ease of use and performance through a single binary deployment.
📅 Created: Mar 2026 • Updated: May 2026

◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦

✨ 𝗞𝗘𝗬 𝗙𝗘𝗔𝗧𝗨𝗥𝗘𝗦 ✨

✅ Single binary, no dependencies
✅ Pipe mode for ad-hoc analysis
✅ Server mode for persistent operation
✅ Lynx Flow query language (SPL2 compatible)
✅ Full-text search with FST inverted index
✅ Columnar storage (.lsg format)
✅ Materialized views
✅ Cluster mode for distributed operation


◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦

📊 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗧𝗦

⭐⭐⭐ 121 𝘀𝘁𝗮𝗿𝘀
🍴 3 𝗳𝗼𝗿𝗸𝘀
🔍 7 𝗼𝗽𝗲𝗻 𝗶𝘀𝘀𝘂𝗲𝘀

◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦

📝 𝗔𝗕𝗢𝗨𝗧 𝗧𝗛𝗜𝗦 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧

LynxDB is a lightweight, single-binary log analytics tool that processes and queries log data using its proprietary Lynx Flow query language. It supports both a pipe mode for ad-hoc analysis directly from standard input and a server mode for persistent data ingestion and querying, offering features like full-text search and columnar storage.

◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦

🔗 𝗟𝗜𝗡𝗞𝗦
• 𝗚𝗶𝘁𝗛𝘂𝗯: https://github.com/lynxbase/lynxdb

𝗦𝗣𝗢𝗧𝗜𝗙𝗟𝗔𝗖-𝗥𝗨 | To provide Russian-speaking users with a localized tool to download high-quality FLAC audio tracks from Spotify, sourced from other premium music streaming services.  🌟 Rising Fast!

┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅

𝗧𝗘𝗖𝗛 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗖𝗞: 📘 TypeScript 
🎯 𝗨𝗦𝗘 𝗖𝗔𝗦𝗘: To provide Russian-speaking users with a localized tool to download high-quality FLAC audio tracks from Spotify, sourced from other premium music streaming services.
📅 Created: Apr 2026 • Updated: May 2026

┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅

✨ 𝗞𝗘𝗬 𝗙𝗘𝗔𝗧𝗨𝗥𝗘𝗦 ✨

✅ Downloads Spotify tracks in true FLAC quality
✅ Sources audio from Tidal, Qobuz, and Amazon Music
✅ No Spotify account required
✅ Full Russian interface translation
✅ Localized error and progress messages
✅ Fixed dependency errors for Windows compilation


┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅

📊 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗧𝗦

⭐ 9 𝘀𝘁𝗮𝗿𝘀
🍴 1 𝗳𝗼𝗿𝗸𝘀
🔍 0 𝗼𝗽𝗲𝗻 𝗶𝘀𝘀𝘂𝗲𝘀

┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅

📝 𝗔𝗕𝗢𝗨𝗧 𝗧𝗛𝗜𝗦 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧

SpotiFLAC-RU is a Russian localization of a tool that downloads Spotify tracks in FLAC quality from various streaming services like Tidal, Qobuz, and Amazon Music without requiring a user account. This fork specifically offers a fully translated interface and localized notifications for Russian-speaking users, along with fixes for Windows compilation issues.

┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅

🔗 𝗟𝗜𝗡𝗞𝗦
• 𝗚𝗶𝘁𝗛𝘂𝗯: https://github.com/FallnixLab/SpotiFLAC-RU

𝗞𝗜𝗔𝗟𝗜 | Providing observability and a management console for Istio service meshes.  📈 Growing!

▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪

𝗧𝗘𝗖𝗛 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗖𝗞: 🐹 Go 
🎯 𝗨𝗦𝗘 𝗖𝗔𝗦𝗘: Providing observability and a management console for Istio service meshes.
📅 Created: Feb 2018 • Updated: May 2026

▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪

✨ 𝗞𝗘𝗬 𝗙𝗘𝗔𝗧𝗨𝗥𝗘𝗦 ✨

✅ Management console for Istio service mesh
✅ Observability and insights into mesh behavior
✅ Installation as an Istio add-on or production integration
✅ Developer-focused documentation and setup guides
✅ AI Documentation (Dev Preview)


▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪

📊 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗧𝗦

⭐⭐⭐⭐ 3.6K 𝘀𝘁𝗮𝗿𝘀
🍴 549 𝗳𝗼𝗿𝗸𝘀
🔍 114 𝗼𝗽𝗲𝗻 𝗶𝘀𝘀𝘂𝗲𝘀

▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪

📝 𝗔𝗕𝗢𝗨𝗧 𝗧𝗛𝗜𝗦 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧

Kiali is a management console for Istio service meshes, providing observability and insights into the mesh's behavior. It can be installed as an Istio add-on or integrated into production environments, offering features for developers to understand and manage their service mesh.

▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪
